partial_progress.details: Phases 4-5 completed (discrete staged construction infrastructure). Phase 6 blocked by pre-existing build errors in DurationTransfer.lean. DiscreteTimeline.lean updated but cannot be verified.

review_reason: Pre-existing build failure in DurationTransfer.lean blocks DiscreteTimeline.lean. Task 974 cannot proceed until DurationTransfer.lean is fixed. Errors: type class instance resolution failures (IsOrderedAddMonoid, Countable) and type mismatch in ratAddCommGroup.

completion_data.completion_summary: Added discrete staged construction infrastructure (discreteStagedBuild, discrete_staged_has_future/past) to StagedExecution.lean and CantorPrereqs.lean. Updated DiscreteTimeline.lean to use discrete construction. Blocked on pre-existing errors in dependency file DurationTransfer.lean.

errors.message: DurationTransfer.lean has pre-existing type errors that block DiscreteTimeline.lean build
